reason: B actually functions as a thank-you note: it is addressed, grounded in a specific remembered scene (the embarrassing draft praised for its two good ideas first), and signed "David" — the user's real first name — which fits genuine in-context generation. I hold moderate confidence because Opus genuinely can produce A's dense metaphorical register, so this is not clear-cut.
